heading: Saturday
text: Clouds spreading north. Highs from the mid 60s to near 70. Light wind turning southeast at 5 to 10 mph in the afternoon.

heading: Saturday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Increasing chance of rain showers from the southwest, spreading northeast overnight. Lows in the 40s. Light southeast wind, with gusty conditions developing over the southern hills.

heading: Sunday
text: Widespread rain showers, with increasing chances in the northeast. Highs from the low to mid 50s. Southeast wind at 5 to 10 mph, gusting 15 to 20 mph over the higher elevations.
